min_entry_age.source_quote: Entry age of Proposer should be between eighteen (18) years and sixty five (65) years

max_entry_age.source_quote: Maximum entry age of any family member is sixty five (65) years

grace_period.source_quote: Grace Period for payment of the premium shall be thirty days

free_look_period.source_quote: free look period of thirty days from date of receipt of the policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: First 30 days waiting period (Excl 03) a) Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within thirty (30) days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-Existing Diseases (Excl 01) a) Expenses related to the treatment of a Pre-Existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of thirty six (36) months of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 90 days/ one year/ two year/ three years (as specified against specific disease/ procedure)

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity (including Baby from Birth Cover) (per insured person, in a policy year, waiting period of 3 years applies) Up to 10% of SI subject to INR

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre Hospitalisation 45 days Post Hospitalisation 75 days

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (National Parivar Mediclaim covers 140+ day care procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 5322 Network Hospitals ('Why Choose NICL' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: i. Insured opting for cover for pre existing diabetes, can avail treatment for diabetes, subject to a copayment of 10%

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote: 1.2.1.1 Limit for Room Charges and Intensive Care Unit Charges Room charges and intensive care unit charges per day shall be payable up to the limit as shown in the Table of Benefits.

ayush_coverage.source_quote: 1.2.6 AYUSH Treatment The Company shall indemnify Medical Expenses incurred for Inpatient Care treatment under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines during each Policy Period up to the limit of Sum Insured as specified in the Policy Schedule in any AYUSH Hospital.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: 1.2.11 Maternity The Company shall indemnify Maternity Expenses as described below for any female Insured Person, and also Pre-Natal and Post- Natal Hospitalisation expenses per delivery, including expenses for necessary vaccination for the New Born Baby

newborn_coverage.source_quote: New Born Baby shall be automatically covered from birth under the Sum Insured available to the mother during the corresponding Policy Period, for up to 3 months of age.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 1.2.7 Organ Donor's Medical Expenses The Company shall indemnify the Medical Expenses incurred in respect of an organ donor's Hospitalisation during the Policy Period for harvesting of the organ donated to an Insured Person

restoration_benefit.source_quote: 1.3.1 Reinstatement of Basic Sum Insured (available to Basic Sum Insured of ₹ 6L and above) For Policies with Floater Basic Sum Insured of ₹ 6 lacs and above, in the event of available Sum Insured being exhausted anytime

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: 1.2.4 Domiciliary Hospitalisation The Company shall indemnify the Medical Expenses incurred under Domiciliary Hospitalization, including pre hospitalisation expenses and post hospitalisation expenses, up to the limit as shown in the Table of Benefits.

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: 1.4.2 Preventive Health Check Up Expenses of preventive health check-up/ prescribed diagnostic tests will be reimbursed once at the end of a block of three (03) continuous years provided no claims are reported and admitted during the block

critical_illness_cover.source_quote: Pre-existing Diabetes and/or Hypertension, Outpatient Treatment and Critical Illness are provided as Optional Covers.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility is available if opted for TPA service, subject to prior approval by the TPA

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: not be accumulated in excess of 50% of the Basic Sum Insured

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: pre-authorization letter within an hour to the Hospital after verification

room_rent_capping.value: 1% of SI per day or actual (lower)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: 1.2.1.1 Limit for Room Charges and Intensive Care Unit Charges Room charges and intensive care unit charges per day shall be payable up to the limit as shown in the Table of Benefits.

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: increase by 5% of Basic SI in respect of each claim free
